Interface IOverviewTileParameters2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control overview image parameters.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("9C4965AB-519A-4FBB-80FC-9F1965D06F3E")]
public interface IOverviewTileParameters2 : IOverviewTileParameters

Properties

AoiGeometry 

IGeometry AoiGeometry { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeometry

BaseCellSize

The cell size of the first level of overview tiles. If this property is not specified, the value in IOverviewTileParameters.CellSize is used.

IPoint BaseCellSize { get; set; }

Property Value

IPoint
